long_product_detail:
ReishiMx is produced through solid wood log cultivation, which requires a 120-200 day cultivation period. This method is preferred to sawdust and liquid cultivation because it yields both polysaccharides and triterpenes from the fruiting body. In addition, other cultivation methods are prone to contamination and are difficult to control quality. Pharmanex has chosen to use red Reishi in ReishiMx because it can produce the highest quality extract and has been subject to the most scientific evaluation.

Pharmanex has developed an exclusive multi-step extraction process that increases the yield and concentration of active ingredients. This exclusive technology detaches additional polysaccharides from the cell walls. The resulting product, ReishiMx, is standardized to 6% triterpenes and 13.5% polysaccharides, which is the highest level of actives currently available in a Reishi product.
